hero.headline: MUJ Online MBA in Human Resource Management: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved Super/Dual specialization. 12 spec subjects in Sem 3-4. NAAC A+, NIRF #58.

sections.tldr: MUJ Online MBA in HRM covers manpower planning, talent management, performance management, compensation, and change management for HR professionals targeting CHRO track or HR business partner roles. NAAC A+, NIRF #58 at Rs 1,53,000 upfront (15% off) or Rs 1,80,000. Super/Dual spec — pair HRM with Analytics for HRIS and people analytics profiles. Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 (70% off). Best for HR professionals targeting HR Head, HRBP, or talent management leadership roles.

about.body:
Human Resource Management is the MBA specialization for professionals managing the people function in organisations: HRBPs, talent acquisition leads, compensation managers, and L&D professionals who want to move into CHRO, HR Director, or Head of People roles. The MUJ Online MBA in HRM covers the full HR management spectrum: manpower planning, talent acquisition, organisational development, compensation and benefits design, performance management systems, and change management.

MUJ's Super/Dual specialization is particularly valuable for HR professionals. Pairing HRM with Analytics and Data Science creates a people analytics credential — one of the fastest-growing areas in HR technology. Pairing with Operations Management builds HR capacity for manufacturing and operations-heavy employers. Both combinations are increasingly requested by CHROs at technology and manufacturing companies.

The Coursera Plus bundle at Rs 3,999 gives HRM students access to people management, HR analytics, and organisational psychology courses from University of Minnesota and University of California Irvine — internationally recognised certificates that complement the MUJ HR curriculum.

Manipal University Jaipur Online is NAAC A+ accredited with NIRF #58 University ranking for 2025. EdifyEdu verifies accreditation data independently and does not receive commission from MUJ. Full programme overview at /universities/manipal-university-jaipur-online/mba.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Strategy frameworks, competitive analysis, and linking HR strategy to business strategy.

sem3Subjects.name: Term Paper
sem3Subjects.description: Independent research paper applying HRM theory to a real-world organisational people challenge.

sem3Subjects.name: Manpower Planning and Sourcing
sem3Subjects.description: Workforce demand forecasting, job analysis, sourcing strategy, and talent pipeline development.

sem3Subjects.name: Management and Organizational Development
sem3Subjects.description: OD interventions, change facilitation, culture transformation, and learning organisation frameworks.

sem3Subjects.name: Employee Relations Management
sem3Subjects.description: Industrial relations, grievance handling, disciplinary procedures, and collective bargaining processes.

sem3Subjects.name: HR Audit
sem3Subjects.description: HR function audit methodology, compliance review, HR metrics benchmarking, and process improvement.

sem4Subjects.name: International Business Management
sem4Subjects.description: Global HR considerations, expatriate management, cross-cultural teams, and international HR practices.

sem4Subjects.name: Project
sem4Subjects.description: Major dissertation applying HRM specialization learning to an original applied business study.

sem4Subjects.name: Compensation and Benefits
sem4Subjects.description: Pay structure design, variable pay, benefits benchmarking, and total rewards strategy.

sem4Subjects.name: Performance Management and Appraisal
sem4Subjects.description: PMS design, OKR and KRA frameworks, appraisal methods, and performance improvement planning.

sem4Subjects.name: Talent Management and Employee Retention
sem4Subjects.description: Succession planning, high potential identification, engagement drivers, and attrition management.

sem4Subjects.name: Change Management
sem4Subjects.description: Change readiness assessment, communication planning, stakeholder management, and transformation leadership.

syllabus.note: Semester 1 and 2 subjects are shared across all MUJ Online MBA specializations. Full programme structure at /universities/manipal-university-jaipur-online/mba.

whoHires.body:
HRM MBA graduates from Manipal University Jaipur Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** IT and technology services, Manufacturing, BFSI, Consulting, Healthcare

**Entry-level roles:** HR Executive, Talent Acquisition Specialist, HR Business Partner (junior), L&D Coordinator

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** HR Manager, HRBP, Compensation and Benefits Manager, Talent Acquisition Manager, L&D Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** HR Director, Chief People Officer, Head of Talent, VP Human Resources, CHRO

**Top hiring organisations:** TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Deloitte India, HDFC Bank, Cognizant, Mahindra, Aditya Birla Group, Bajaj Auto

skills.body:
The HRM specialization builds skills that HR leaders and CHROs test in talent management and people function leadership roles:

**Technical skills:**
- Talent Management: succession planning frameworks, high potential identification, career pathing, and retention analytics for reducing attrition
- Compensation Design: pay banding, variable pay structures, ESOP design, and total rewards benchmarking against industry surveys
- Performance Management: OKR and KRA design, calibration processes, PIP structuring, and linking performance to compensation
- Employee Relations: industrial relations law, standing orders, grievance redressal, and union negotiation frameworks

**Applied skills:**
- HR Analytics: workforce demand modelling, attrition prediction, and HR dashboard design for CHRO-level reporting
- Change Management: ADKAR and Kotter frameworks applied to large-scale HR transformation and M&A people integration

**Soft skills:** Facilitating difficult conversations on performance and exits, building credibility with line managers as an HRBP, presenting workforce strategy and headcount plans to CEOs and boards.

comparisons.body:
Comparing MUJ Online MBA HRM against peers:

**vs Amity Online MBA Human Resource Management:** Amity is NAAC A+ and NIRF #22 at Rs 2,25,000. Amity HRM has strong coverage of industrial relations and HR analytics. MUJ HRM covers change management, talent management, and compensation design with equal depth. MUJ's Rs 1,53,000 upfront fee is 32% lower. Amity NIRF #22 carries more weight in pan-India corporate HR hiring. For north India manufacturing and IT employers, both are well recognised.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA Human Resource Management:** NMIMS is NAAC A++ and NIRF Management #24 at Rs 1,96,000-2,20,000. NMIMS HRM covers organisational development and emotional intelligence as specific subjects — a differentiated offering. NMIMS brand is stronger at large private sector employers. MUJ's Super/Dual spec flexibility and Coursera Plus are cost-performance advantages.

**vs LPU Online MBA HRM:** LPU is NAAC A++ with strong placement infrastructure. LPU does not offer a Super/Dual specialization structure. MUJ's Coursera Plus access and Manipal brand recognition are advantages for HR roles at technology companies and national manufacturers. LPU has stronger alumni networks in Punjab and Haryana.

fees.body:
The total program fee for the Manipal University Jaipur Online MBA in Human Resource Management can be paid through 2 options:

**Option 1 — Semester-wise payment**: Rs 45,000 per semester, Rs 1,80,000 total across 4 semesters
**Option 2 — Full upfront payment (discounted)**: Rs 1,53,000 one-time (Rs 1,80,000 standard less 15 percent fee concession)

A one-time registration fee of Rs 500 applies at enrolment. MUJ does not charge separate exam fees per attempt, project evaluation fees, or admission processing fees beyond this.

For working professionals, MUJ offers a 24-month zero-cost EMI plan at approximately Rs 7,500 per month on the standard fee (Rs 6,375 per month on the discounted fee) through its NBFC lending partners.

**Scholarships available** (non-stackable — pick one based on eligibility):
- **Divyaang** (persons with disabilities): 20% discount with Divyaang certificate
- **Defence personnel**: 20% discount with Service/IC number
- **Manipal University Jaipur alumni** (UG or PG): 20% discount
- **Government employees**: 10% discount with Govt ID
- **Merit scholarship**: 10% discount for 80%+ marks in 10+2 or bachelor's

**Coursera Plus bundled access** (MUJ differentiator): Enrolled MUJ students get Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 (standard Rs 13,999 — a 70 percent discount). This includes 10,000+ courses from University of Virginia, University of Michigan, Johns Hopkins, University of California Irvine, and other top global universities.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees and scholarships with Manipal University Jaipur each quarter. Please reconfirm current offers and eligibility with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The Manipal University Jaipur degree certificate carries the Manipal University Jaipur name, the MBA designation, and identifies the online learning mode per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The Human Resource Management specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode identification on the certificate is standard for UGC-DEB approved programmes and equivalent in recognition to regular MBA degrees for employment, promotions, and further studies.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from MUJ Online MBA HRM alumni. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Deepika Sharma
items.liked: Talent management and performance management content was directly applicable to my HR business partner role
items.disliked: HR technology and HRIS tools content was minimal — important given how HR tech adoption is accelerating
items.body: I paired HRM with Analytics and Data Science as my dual specialization, targeting people analytics. The talent management, succession planning, and performance management frameworks were the strongest parts of the curriculum. The Coursera Plus access gave me an HR Analytics course from University of Minnesota at a fraction of the normal cost. The Manipal University Jaipur credential was accepted without issue for my HRBP promotion at a large IT company.

items.name: Arvind Kumar
items.liked: Compensation and benefits module covered pay structure design and ESOPs at a level useful for my compensation manager role
items.disliked: LMS session recordings had audio quality issues in some lectures — needed to follow up for replacement materials
items.body: I work in compensation and benefits at a manufacturing company. The pay banding, variable pay, and total rewards benchmarking content was substantive and directly applicable. The change management module was useful when my company went through a restructuring. The Manipal brand was well received by my employer. I would have appreciated better career support for HR-specific placements.

items.name: Sneha Iyer
items.liked: Employee relations management content covered industrial relations law at a depth useful for my plant HR role
items.disliked: Career services were not useful for HR roles specifically. The placement cell does not maintain CHRO or HR director-level connections
items.body: The content for employee relations and HR audit was strong — practical and applicable to my manufacturing plant HR context. My dissatisfaction was the disconnect between academic quality and placement support quality. The career portal had limited HR job postings and the counsellors could not help with senior HRBP role search. I found my current role independently. If placement support is your primary concern, this programme may not meet your expectations.

faqs.question: Can I choose dual specialization with the MUJ Online MBA in HRM?
faqs.answer: Yes. MUJ's Super/Dual specialization allows you to pair HRM with a second specialization at no additional cost. The most strategic combinations for HR professionals: HRM plus Analytics and Data Science (for people analytics and HR tech roles), HRM plus Operations Management (for manufacturing and supply chain HR), or HRM plus Finance (for compensation analytics and total rewards). This dual credential is listed on your marksheet.

faqs.question: Is Coursera Plus access included in the MUJ MBA fee or charged separately?
faqs.answer: Coursera Plus is available to enrolled MUJ students at Rs 3,999 per year versus the standard Rs 13,999 — a 70 percent discount. For HRM students, relevant Coursera Plus offerings include people management courses from University of Minnesota, HR analytics from Wharton, and diversity and inclusion programmes from University of California. The access is a practical supplement to the MUJ curriculum.

faqs.question: What scholarships are available for the MUJ Online MBA in HRM?
faqs.answer: MUJ offers five scholarship categories: 20% for Divyaang individuals, 20% for Defence personnel, 20% for MUJ alumni, 10% for Government employees, and 10% merit scholarship for 80%+ marks. These are non-stackable — you pick the one that applies to your situation. Upfront payment of the full fee gets an additional 15% fee concession (Rs 1,80,000 becomes Rs 1,53,000).

faqs.question: What salary can HRM MBA graduates from MUJ expect?
faqs.answer: HR managers and HRBPs with 3-5 years of experience and this MBA earn Rs 8-14 lakh at IT services and manufacturing companies. Compensation and benefits managers earn Rs 10-18 lakh. HR Directors and VP HR roles at mid-size companies pay Rs 20-40 lakh. CHRO roles at large organisations pay Rs 35-70 lakh. Outcomes depend on company type, size, and whether the candidate supplements with SHRM, HRCI, or people analytics certifications.

faqs.question: Is this MBA relevant for HR professionals in manufacturing and industrial companies?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Employee Relations Management and HR Audit subjects are specifically relevant for plant HR and industrial relations roles. The Change Management subject applies to manufacturing restructuring, lean transformation, and ERP implementation projects. Pairing HRM with Operations Management as your dual specialization creates a strong credential for HR leadership at manufacturing companies that require understanding of operations alongside people management.

chooseIf: You are an HR professional targeting HRBP, HR Director, or CHRO roles and want a NAAC A+ MBA under Rs 1.8 lakh with dual specialization flexibility.
You want to pair HRM with Analytics and Data Science to build a people analytics credential for HR tech roles at technology companies.
You value Coursera Plus access to supplement your HR MBA with global people management and analytics certifications.
consider: You are targeting CHRO roles at large private sector companies where NMIMS Human Resource Management or XLRI PGDHRM carry stronger hiring weight.
You need active placement support for HR roles — MUJ online placement services are limited and you will need to drive your own search.
You are targeting a specialist people analytics role — supplement any MBA with SHRM CP/SCP, HRCI PHR, or a dedicated analytics certification for the strongest credentials combination.
